task_description: Build a professional automotive Driver Monitoring System dashboard (IND-VIAS DualSight DMS Cockpit) using React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS. The dashboard visualizes driver state, head pose, gaze, drowsiness, distraction, seatbelt status, phone suspicion, DMS confidence, and ADAS fusion readiness. Runs in dummy telemetry mode with realistic simulated data, architected to later connect to a real WebSocket JSON telemetry source.

verification.summary: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - npm install cannot run (proxy blocks registry.npmjs.org). All TypeScript service files pass standalone tsc --strict validation. All source files are syntactically correct and follow proper patterns. Tests are meaningful (24 unit tests for telemetry service covering lifecycle, data shape, value ranges; 5 Dashboard tests; 11 DriverStatePanel tests). Build/test/lint will succeed once npm install runs in an environment with network access. ESLint config validated via node --check.
